verses.english: And He placed on the earth firmly set mountains over its surface, and He blessed it and determined therein its [creatures\'] sustenance in four days without distinction - for [the information] of those who ask.

verses.arabic: فَإِنْ أَعْرَضُوا۟ فَقُلْ أَنذَرْتُكُمْ صَـٰعِقَةً مِّثْلَ صَـٰعِقَةِ عَادٍ وَثَمُودَ
verses.english: But if they turn away, then say, "I have warned you of a thunderbolt like the thunderbolt [that struck] \'Aad and Thamud.

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَقَالُوا۟ مَنْ أَشَدُّ مِنَّا قُوَّةً ۖ أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَهُمْ هُوَ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا يَجْحَدُونَ
verses.english: As for \'Aad, they were arrogant upon the earth without right and said, "Who is greater than us in strength?" Did they not consider that Allah who created them was greater than them in strength? But they were rejecting Our signs.

verses.arabic: وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ أَن يَشْهَدَ عَلَيْكُمْ سَمْعُكُمْ وَلَآ أَبْصَـٰرُكُمْ وَلَا جُلُودُكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن ظَنَنتُمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَعْلَمُ كَثِيرًا مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: And you were not covering yourselves, lest your hearing testify against you or your sight or your skins, but you assumed that Allah does not know much of what you do.

verses.arabic: وَذَٰلِكُمْ ظَنُّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى ظَنَنتُم بِرَبِّكُمْ أَرْدَىٰكُمْ فَأَصْبَحْتُم مِّنَ ٱلْخَـٰسِرِينَ
verses.english: And that was your assumption which you assumed about your Lord. It has brought you to ruin, and you have become among the losers."

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ أَعْدَآءِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ لَهُمْ فِيهَا دَارُ ٱلْخُلْدِ ۖ جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا يَجْحَدُونَ
verses.english: That is the recompense of the enemies of Allah - the Fire. For them therein is the home of eternity as recompense for what they, of Our verses, were rejecting.

verses.arabic: نُزُلًا مِّنْ غَفُورٍ رَّحِيمٍ
verses.english: As accommodation from a [Lord who is] Forgiving and Merciful."

verses.arabic: وَمَا يُلَقَّىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ صَبَرُوا۟ وَمَا يُلَقَّىٰهَآ إِلَّا ذُو حَظٍّ عَظِيمٍ
verses.english: But none is granted it except those who are patient, and none is granted it except one having a great portion [of good].

verses.arabic: وَإِمَّا يَنزَغَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ نَزْغٌ فَٱسْتَعِذْ بِٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.english: And if there comes to you from Satan an evil suggestion, then seek refuge in Allah. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

verses.arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَـٰتِهِ ٱلَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ وَٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ ۚ لَا تَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلشَّمْسِ وَلَا لِلْقَمَرِ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَهُنَّ إِن كُنتُمْ إِيَّاهُ تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.english: And of His signs are the night and day and the sun and moon. Do not prostrate to the sun or to the moon, but prostate to Allah, who created them, if it should be Him that you worship.

verses.arabic: فَإِنِ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فَٱلَّذِينَ عِندَ رَبِّكَ يُسَبِّحُونَ لَهُۥ بِٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْـَٔمُونَ ۩
verses.english: But if they are arrogant - then those who are near your Lord exalt Him by night and by day, and they do not become weary.

verses.arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦٓ أَنَّكَ تَرَى ٱلْأَرْضَ خَـٰشِعَةً فَإِذَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْهَا ٱلْمَآءَ ٱهْتَزَّتْ وَرَبَتْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحْيَاهَا لَمُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: And of His signs is that you see the earth stilled, but when We send down upon it rain, it quivers and grows. Indeed, He who has given it life is the Giver of Life to the dead. Indeed, He is over all things competent.

verses.arabic: لَّا يَسْـَٔمُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِن دُعَآءِ ٱلْخَيْرِ وَإِن مَّسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ فَيَـُٔوسٌ قَنُوطٌ
verses.english: Man is not weary of supplication for good [things], but if evil touches him, he is hopeless and despairing.

verses.arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِن كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ كَفَرْتُم بِهِۦ مَنْ أَضَلُّ مِمَّنْ هُوَ فِى شِقَاقٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
verses.english: Say, "Have you considered: if the Qur\'an is from Allah and you disbelieved in it, who would be more astray than one who is in extreme dissension?"

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ٱللَّهُ حَفِيظٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِوَكِيلٍ
verses.english: And those who take as allies other than Him - Allah is [yet] Guardian over them; and you, [O Muhammad], are not over them a manager.

verses.arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ ۖ فَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلْوَلِىُّ وَهُوَ يُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: Or have they taken protectors [or allies] besides him? But Allah - He is the Protector, and He gives life to the dead, and He is over all things competent.

verses.arabic: وَمَا ٱخْتَلَفْتُمْ فِيهِ مِن شَىْءٍ فَحُكْمُهُۥٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبِّى عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَإِلَيْهِ أُنِيبُ
verses.english: And in anything over which you disagree - its ruling is [to be referred] to Allah. [Say], "That is Allah, my Lord; upon Him I have relied, and to Him I turn back."

verses.arabic: يَسْتَعْجِلُ بِهَا ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهَا ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مُشْفِقُونَ مِنْهَا وَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهَا ٱلْحَقُّ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُمَارُونَ فِى ٱلسَّاعَةِ لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
verses.english: Those who do not believe in it are impatient for it, but those who believe are fearful of it and know that it is the truth. Unquestionably, those who dispute concerning the Hour are in extreme error.

verses.arabic: مَن كَانَ يُرِيدُ حَرْثَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ نَزِدْ لَهُۥ فِى حَرْثِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَانَ يُرِيدُ حَرْثَ ٱلدُّنْيَا نُؤْتِهِۦ مِنْهَا وَمَا لَهُۥ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ مِن نَّصِيبٍ
verses.english: Whoever desires the harvest of the Hereafter - We increase for him in his harvest. And whoever desires the harvest of this world - We give him thereof, but there is not for him in the Hereafter any share.

verses.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يَقْبَلُ ٱلتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.english: And it is He who accepts repentance from his servants and pardons misdeeds, and He knows what you do.

verses.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْغَيْثَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا قَنَطُوا۟ وَيَنشُرُ رَحْمَتَهُۥ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْوَلِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.english: And it is He who sends down the rain after they had despaired and spreads His mercy. And He is the Protector, the Praiseworthy.

verses.arabic: وَمِنْ ءَايَـٰتِهِ ٱلْجَوَارِ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
verses.english: And of His signs are the ships in the sea, like mountains.

verses.arabic: وَيَعْلَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُجَـٰدِلُونَ فِىٓ ءَايَـٰتِنَا مَا لَهُم مِّن مَّحِيصٍ
verses.english: And [that is so] those who dispute concerning Our signs may know that for them there is no place of escape.

verses.arabic: فَمَآ أُوتِيتُم مِّن شَىْءٍ فَمَتَـٰعُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَمَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ
verses.english: So whatever thing you have been given - it is but [for] enjoyment of the worldly life. But what is with Allah is better and more lasting for those who have believed and upon their Lord rely

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتَجَابُوا۟ لِرَبِّهِمْ وَأَقَامُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَمْرُهُمْ شُورَىٰ بَيْنَهُمْ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَـٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
verses.english: And those who have responded to their lord and established prayer and whose affair is [determined by] consultation among themselves, and from what We have provided them, they spend.

verses.arabic: وَلَمَنِ ٱنتَصَرَ بَعْدَ ظُلْمِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ مَا عَلَيْهِم مِّن سَبِيلٍ
verses.english: And whoever avenges himself after having been wronged - those have not upon them any cause [for blame].

verses.arabic: وَلَمَن صَبَرَ وَغَفَرَ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمِنْ عَزْمِ ٱلْأُمُورِ
verses.english: And whoever is patient and forgives - indeed, that is of the matters [requiring] determination.

verses.arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰهُ قُرْءَٰنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.english: Indeed, We have made it an Arabic Qur\'an that you might understand.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ فِىٓ أُمِّ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِىٌّ حَكِيمٌ
verses.english: And indeed it is, in the Mother of the Book with Us, exalted and full of wisdom.

verses.arabic: وَكَمْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن نَّبِىٍّ فِى ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: And how many a prophet We sent among the former peoples,

verses.arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن نَّبِىٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.english: But there would not come to them a prophet except that they used to ridicule him.

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
verses.english: [The one] who has made for you the earth a bed and made for you upon it roads that you might be guided

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْفُلْكِ وَٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ مَا تَرْكَبُونَ
verses.english: And who created the species, all of them, and has made for you of ships and animals those which you mount.

verses.arabic: لِتَسْتَوُۥا۟ عَلَىٰ ظُهُورِهِۦ ثُمَّ تَذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ رَبِّكُمْ إِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَتَقُولُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَـٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُۥ مُقْرِنِينَ
verses.english: That you may settle yourselves upon their backs and then remember the favor of your Lord when you have settled upon them and say. "Exalted is He who has subjected this to us, and we could not have [otherwise] subdued it.

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ لَهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ جُزْءًا ۚ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَكَفُورٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: But they have attributed to Him from His servants a portion. Indeed, man is clearly ungrateful.

verses.arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ بَنَاتٍ وَأَصْفَىٰكُم بِٱلْبَنِينَ
verses.english: Or has He taken, out of what He has created, daughters and chosen you for [having] sons?

verses.arabic: أَوَمَن يُنَشَّؤُا۟ فِى ٱلْحِلْيَةِ وَهُوَ فِى ٱلْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٍ
verses.english: So is one brought up in ornaments while being during conflict unevident [attributed to Allah]?

verses.arabic: أَمْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمْ كِتَـٰبًا مِّن قَبْلِهِۦ فَهُم بِهِۦ مُسْتَمْسِكُونَ
verses.english: Or have We given them a book before the Qur\'an to which they are adhering?

verses.arabic: بَلْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.english: Rather, they say, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are in their footsteps [rightly] guided."

verses.arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى قَرْيَةٍ مِّن نَّذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتْرَفُوهَآ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِم مُّقْتَدُونَ
verses.english: And similarly, We did not send before you any warner into a city except that its affluent said, "Indeed, we found our fathers upon a religion, and we are, in their footsteps, following."

verses.arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّنِى بَرَآءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.english: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Abraham said to his father and his people, "Indeed, I am disassociated from that which you worship

verses.arabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۢ بَاقِيَةً فِى عَقِبِهِۦ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.english: And he made it a word remaining among his descendants that they might return [to it].

verses.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانُ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنَ ٱلْقَرْيَتَيْنِ عَظِيمٍ
verses.english: And they said, "Why was this Qur\'an not sent down upon a great man from [one of] the two cities?"

verses.arabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطَـٰنًا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌ
verses.english: And whoever is blinded from remembrance of the Most Merciful - We appoint for him a devil, and he is to him a companion.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَصُدُّونَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.english: And indeed, the devils avert them from the way [of guidance] while they think that they are [rightly] guided

verses.arabic: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ ٱلَّذِى وَعَدْنَـٰهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِم مُّقْتَدِرُونَ
verses.english: Or whether [or not] We show you that which We have promised them, indeed, We are Perfect in Ability.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَذِكْرٌ لَّكَ وَلِقَوْمِكَ ۖ وَسَوْفَ تُسْـَٔلُونَ
verses.english: And indeed, it is a remembrance for you and your people, and you [all] are going to be questioned.

verses.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.english: But when he brought them Our signs, at once they laughed at them.

verses.arabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا ۖ وَأَخَذْنَـٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.english: And We showed them not a sign except that it was greater than its sister, and We seized them with affliction that perhaps they might return [to faith].

verses.arabic: أَمْ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى هُوَ مَهِينٌ وَلَا يَكَادُ يُبِينُ
verses.english: Or am I [not] better than this one who is insignificant and hardly makes himself clear?

verses.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ أُلْقِىَ عَلَيْهِ أَسْوِرَةٌ مِّن ذَهَبٍ أَوْ جَآءَ مَعَهُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ مُقْتَرِنِينَ
verses.english: Then why have there not been placed upon him bracelets of gold or come with him the angels in conjunction?"

verses.arabic: فَٱسْتَخَفَّ قَوْمَهُۥ فَأَطَاعُوهُ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.english: So he bluffed his people, and they obeyed him. Indeed, they were [themselves] a people defiantly disobedient [of Allah].

verses.arabic: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ سَلَفًا وَمَثَلًا لِّلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: And We made them a precedent and an example for the later peoples.

verses.arabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ ءَأَـٰلِهَتُنَا خَيْرٌ أَمْ هُوَ ۚ مَا ضَرَبُوهُ لَكَ إِلَّا جَدَلًۢا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ خَصِمُونَ
verses.english: And they said, "Are your gods better, or is he?" They did not present the comparison except for [mere] argument. But, [in fact], they are a people prone to dispute.

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: And never let Satan avert you. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
verses.english: Indeed, Allah is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. This is a straight path."

verses.arabic: هَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ أَن تَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.english: Are they waiting except for the Hour to come upon them suddenly while they perceive not?

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَكَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.english: [You] who believed in Our verses and were Muslims.

verses.arabic: وَمَا ظَلَمْنَـٰهُمْ وَلَـٰكِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: And We did not wrong them, but it was they who were the wrongdoers.

verses.arabic: لَقَدْ جِئْنَـٰكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَكُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَـٰرِهُونَ
verses.english: We had certainly brought you the truth, but most of you, to the truth, were averse.

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَلَدٌ فَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلْعَـٰبِدِينَ
verses.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "If the Most Merciful had a son, then I would be the first of [his] worshippers."

verses.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.english: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised.

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: And those they invoke besides Him do not possess [power of] intercession; but only those who testify to the truth [can benefit], and they know.

verses.arabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
verses.english: And if you asked them who created them, they would surely say, "Allah." So how are they deluded?

verses.arabic: وَقِيلِهِۦ يَـٰرَبِّ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: And [Allah acknowledges] his saying, "O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe."

verses.arabic: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَـٰمٌ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: So turn aside from them and say, "Peace." But they are going to know.

verses.arabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
verses.english: On that night is made distinct every precise matter -

verses.arabic: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.english: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

verses.arabic: لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.

verses.arabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَـٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.english: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
verses.english: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

verses.arabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.english: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority.

verses.arabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
verses.english: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

verses.arabic: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
verses.english: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."

verses.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
verses.english: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

verses.arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
verses.english: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

verses.arabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
verses.english: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

verses.arabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.english: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

verses.arabic: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهِينَ
verses.english: And comfort wherein they were amused.

verses.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
verses.english: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

verses.arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

verses.arabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

verses.arabic: مَا خَلَقْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

verses.arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.english: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

verses.arabic: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
verses.english: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

verses.arabic: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.english: Like the boiling of scalding water.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.english: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
verses.english: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

verses.arabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.english: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

verses.arabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.english: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

verses.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.english: And indeed, We have eased the Qur\'an in your tongue that they might be reminded.

verses.arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
verses.english: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].

verses.arabic: وَفِى خَلْقِكُمْ وَمَا يَبُثُّ مِن دَآبَّةٍ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّقَوْمٍ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.english: And in the creation of yourselves and what He disperses of moving creatures are signs for people who are certain [in faith].

verses.arabic: قُل لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَغْفِرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ أَيَّامَ ٱللَّهِ لِيَجْزِىَ قَوْمًۢا بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.english: Say, [O Muhammad], to those who have believed that they [should] forgive those who expect not the days of Allah so that He may recompense a people for what they used to earn.

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَـٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.english: Then We put you, [O Muhammad], on an ordained way concerning the matter [of religion]; so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know.

verses.arabic: هَـٰذَا بَصَـٰٓئِرُ لِلنَّاسِ وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةٌ لِّقَوْمٍ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.english: This [Qur\'an] is enlightenment for mankind and guidance and mercy for a people who are certain [in faith].

verses.arabic: هَـٰذَا كِتَـٰبُنَا يَنطِقُ عَلَيْكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا نَسْتَنسِخُ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: This, Our record, speaks about you in truth. Indeed, We were having transcribed whatever you used to do."

verses.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتَأْفِكَنَا عَنْ ءَالِهَتِنَا فَأْتِنَا بِمَا تَعِدُنَآ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: They said, "Have you come to delude us away from our gods? Then bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the truthful."

verses.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَأُبَلِّغُكُم مَّآ أُرْسِلْتُ بِهِۦ وَلَـٰكِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰكُمْ قَوْمًا تَجْهَلُونَ
verses.english: He said, "Knowledge [of its time] is only with Allah, and I convey to you that with which I was sent; but I see you [to be] a people behaving ignorantly."

verses.arabic: أَفَمَن كَانَ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ كَمَن زُيِّنَ لَهُۥ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُم
verses.english: So is he who is on clear evidence from his Lord like him to whom the evil of his work has been made attractive and they follow their [own] desires?

verses.arabic: وَمِنْهُم مَّن يَسْتَمِعُ إِلَيْكَ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا خَرَجُوا۟ مِنْ عِندِكَ قَالُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ مَاذَا قَالَ ءَانِفًا ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ طَبَعَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ
verses.english: And among them, [O Muhammad], are those who listen to you, until when they depart from you, they say to those who were given knowledge, "What has he said just now?" Those are the ones of whom Allah has sealed over their hearts and who have followed their [own] desires.

verses.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَعَنَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ فَأَصَمَّهُمْ وَأَعْمَىٰٓ أَبْصَـٰرَهُمْ
verses.english: Those [who do so] are the ones that Allah has cursed, so He deafened them and blinded their vision.

verses.arabic: أَفَلَا يَتَدَبَّرُونَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ أَمْ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبٍ أَقْفَالُهَآ
verses.english: Then do they not reflect upon the Qur\'an, or are there locks upon [their] hearts?

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمُ ٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَآ أَسْخَطَ ٱللَّهَ وَكَرِهُوا۟ رِضْوَٰنَهُۥ فَأَحْبَطَ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
verses.english: That is because they followed what angered Allah and disliked [what earns] His pleasure, so He rendered worthless their deeds.

verses.arabic: أَمْ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ أَن لَّن يُخْرِجَ ٱللَّهُ أَضْغَـٰنَهُمْ
verses.english: Or do those in whose hearts is disease think that Allah would never expose their [feelings of] hatred?

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا لَكَ فَتْحًا مُّبِينًا
verses.english: Indeed, We have given you, [O Muhammad], a clear conquest

verses.arabic: وَيَنصُرَكَ ٱللَّهُ نَصْرًا عَزِيزًا
verses.english: And [that] Allah may aid you with a mighty victory.

verses.arabic: لِّيُدْخِلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنْهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ ۚ وَكَانَ ذَٰلِكَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ فَوْزًا عَظِيمًا
verses.english: [And] that He may admit the believing men and the believing women to gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein eternally and remove from them their misdeeds - and ever is that, in the sight of Allah, a great attainment -

verses.arabic: ۞ لَّقَدْ رَضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِذْ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحْتَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِى قُلُوبِهِمْ فَأَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَأَثَـٰبَهُمْ فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا
verses.english: Certainly was Allah pleased with the believers when they pledged allegiance to you, [O Muhammad], under the tree, and He knew what was in their hearts, so He sent down tranquillity upon them and rewarded them with an imminent conquest

verses.arabic: وَأُخْرَىٰ لَمْ تَقْدِرُوا۟ عَلَيْهَا قَدْ أَحَاطَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرًا
verses.english: And [He promises] other [victories] that you were [so far] unable to [realize] which Allah has already encompassed. And ever is Allah, over all things, competent.

verses.arabic: وَلَوْ قَـٰتَلَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوَلَّوُا۟ ٱلْأَدْبَـٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيًّا وَلَا نَصِيرًا
verses.english: And if those [Makkans] who disbelieve had fought you, they would have turned their backs [in flight]. Then they would not find a protector or a helper.

verses.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَّ أَيْدِيَهُمْ عَنكُمْ وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ عَنْهُم بِبَطْنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَنْ أَظْفَرَكُمْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
verses.english: And it is He who withheld their hands from you and your hands from them within [the area of] Makkah after He caused you to overcome them. And ever is Allah of what you do, Seeing.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَرْفَعُوٓا۟ أَصْوَٰتَكُمْ فَوْقَ صَوْتِ ٱلنَّبِىِّ وَلَا تَجْهَرُوا۟ لَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ كَجَهْرِ بَعْضِكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ أَن تَحْبَطَ أَعْمَـٰلُكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet or be loud to him in speech like the loudness of some of you to others, lest your deeds become worthless while you perceive not.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنَادُونَكَ مِن وَرَآءِ ٱلْحُجُرَٰتِ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.english: Indeed, those who call you, [O Muhammad], from behind the chambers - most of them do not use reason.

verses.arabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ صَبَرُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ تَخْرُجَ إِلَيْهِمْ لَكَانَ خَيْرًا لَّهُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: And if they had been patient until you [could] come out to them, it would have been better for them. But Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِن جَآءَكُمْ فَاسِقٌۢ بِنَبَإٍ فَتَبَيَّنُوٓا۟ أَن تُصِيبُوا۟ قَوْمًۢا بِجَهَـٰلَةٍ فَتُصْبِحُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَعَلْتُمْ نَـٰدِمِينَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, if there comes to you a disobedient one with information, investigate, lest you harm a people out of ignorance and become, over what you have done, regretful.

verses.arabic: فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَنِعْمَةً ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.english: [It is] as bounty from Allah and favor. And Allah is Knowing and Wise.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَ أَخَوَيْكُمْ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.english: The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers. And fear Allah that you may receive mercy.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
verses.english: Qaf. By the honored Qur\'an...

verses.arabic: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
verses.english: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ
verses.english: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,

verses.arabic: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.english: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah].

verses.arabic: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
verses.english: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -

verses.arabic: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
verses.english: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection.

verses.arabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
verses.english: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
verses.english: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein

verses.arabic: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
verses.english: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left.

verses.arabic: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
verses.english: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].

verses.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
verses.english: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,

verses.arabic: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.english: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].

verses.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
verses.english: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].

verses.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.english: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration.

verses.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.english: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination

verses.arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
verses.english: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur\'an whoever fears My threat.

verses.arabic: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
verses.english: And those [clouds] carrying a load [of water]

verses.arabic: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
verses.english: And those [ships] sailing with ease

verses.arabic: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.english: And those [angels] apportioning [each] matter,

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
verses.english: Indeed, what you are promised is true.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.english: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.

verses.arabic: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
verses.english: Indeed, you are in differing speech.

verses.arabic: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
verses.english: Deluded away from the Qur\'an is he who is deluded.

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
verses.english: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.

verses.arabic: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
verses.english: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.

verses.arabic: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
verses.english: They used to sleep but little of the night,

verses.arabic: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
verses.english: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,

verses.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.english: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.

verses.arabic: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
verses.english: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]

verses.arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
verses.english: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf

verses.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.english: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.english: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."

verses.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.english: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

verses.arabic: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
verses.english: To send down upon them stones of clay,

verses.arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.english: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."

verses.arabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.english: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers.

verses.arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
verses.english: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman."

verses.arabic: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.english: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."

verses.arabic: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.english: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.

verses.arabic: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.english: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
verses.english: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.

verses.arabic: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

verses.arabic: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

verses.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
verses.english: So leave them, [O Muhammad], for you are not to be blamed.

verses.arabic: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.english: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.

verses.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
verses.english: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.

verses.arabic: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
verses.english: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
verses.english: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.

verses.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.english: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
verses.english: And [by] the sea filled [with fire],

verses.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.english: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,

verses.arabic: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

verses.arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

verses.arabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.english: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

verses.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
verses.english: So remind [O Muhammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.

verses.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
verses.english: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time?"

verses.arabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.english: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."

verses.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

verses.arabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.

verses.arabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.english: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

verses.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
verses.english: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.english: Or has He daughters while you have sons?

verses.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.english: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

verses.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.english: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.english: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.

verses.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
verses.english: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."

verses.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.english: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise.

verses.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.english: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.

verses.arabic: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.english: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,

verses.arabic: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰٓ
verses.english: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.

verses.arabic: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلْقُوَىٰ
verses.english: Taught to him by one intense in strength -

verses.arabic: ذُو مِرَّةٍ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ
verses.english: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form

verses.arabic: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ
verses.english: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.

verses.arabic: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.english: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.english: And he certainly saw him in another descent

verses.arabic: عِندَ سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.english: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -

verses.arabic: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ
verses.english: Near it is the Garden of Refuge -

verses.arabic: إِذْ يَغْشَى ٱلسِّدْرَةَ مَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.english: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].

verses.arabic: مَا زَاغَ ٱلْبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.english: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].

verses.arabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
verses.english: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلْعُزَّىٰ
verses.english: So have you considered al-Lat and al-\'Uzza?

verses.arabic: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ
verses.english: And Manat, the third - the other one?

verses.arabic: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.english: Is the male for you and for Him the female?

verses.arabic: تِلْكَ إِذًا قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.english: That, then, is an unjust division.

verses.arabic: أَمْ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.english: Or is there for man whatever he wishes?

verses.arabic: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.english: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.english: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,

verses.arabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
verses.english: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.

verses.arabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.english: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.english: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.english: Have you seen the one who turned away

verses.arabic: وَأَعْطَىٰ قَلِيلًا وَأَكْدَىٰٓ
verses.english: And gave a little and [then] refrained?

verses.arabic: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.english: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?

verses.arabic: وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِى وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.english: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -

verses.arabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.english: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ سَعْيَهُۥ سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.english: And that his effort is going to be seen -

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.english: And that to your Lord is the finality

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ
verses.english: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا
verses.english: And that it is He who causes death and gives life

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.english: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -

verses.arabic: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ
verses.english: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ
verses.english: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ
verses.english: And that it is He who enriches and suffices

verses.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ
verses.english: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius

verses.arabic: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ
verses.english: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them] -

verses.arabic: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ
verses.english: And the overturned towns He hurled down

verses.arabic: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.english: And covered them by that which He covered.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.english: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?

verses.arabic: هَـٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.english: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners.

verses.arabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.english: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover.

verses.arabic: أَفَمِنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ
verses.english: Then at this statement do you wonder?

verses.arabic: وَأَنتُمْ سَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.english: While you are proudly sporting?

verses.arabic: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩
verses.english: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him].

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.english: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
verses.english: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -

verses.arabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.english: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].

verses.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
verses.english: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,

verses.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.english: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

verses.arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.english: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

verses.arabic: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
verses.english: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

verses.arabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.english: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

verses.arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
verses.english: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

verses.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.english: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

verses.arabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
verses.english: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

verses.arabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.english: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

verses.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
verses.english: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

verses.arabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.english: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

verses.arabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.english: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

verses.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
verses.english: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

verses.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.english: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.

verses.arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
verses.english: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
verses.english: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.

verses.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.english: And everything they did is in written records.

verses.arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
verses.english: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.

verses.arabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
verses.english: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.

verses.arabic: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ
verses.english: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,

verses.arabic: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ
verses.english: And the stars and trees prostrate.

verses.arabic: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ
verses.english: That you not transgress within the balance.

verses.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ
verses.english: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.

verses.arabic: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ
verses.english: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]

verses.arabic: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ
verses.english: And grain having husks and scented plants.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ
verses.english: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.

verses.arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
verses.english: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ
verses.english: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ
verses.english: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];

verses.arabic: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ
verses.english: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.english: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
verses.english: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.english: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ
verses.english: In both of them are two springs, flowing.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ
verses.english: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
verses.english: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.english: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.english: As if they were rubies and coral.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ
verses.english: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.english: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.english: In both of them are two springs, spouting.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِمَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَنَخْلٌ وَرُمَّانٌ
verses.english: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٰتٌ حِسَانٌ
verses.english: In them are good and beautiful women -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: حُورٌ مَّقْصُورَٰتٌ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ
verses.english: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.english: Untouched before them by man or jinni -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -

verses.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.english: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?

verses.arabic: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.english: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

verses.arabic: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
verses.english: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.

verses.arabic: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّا
verses.english: When the earth is shaken with convulsion

verses.arabic: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّا
verses.english: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling

verses.arabic: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا ثَلَـٰثَةً
verses.english: And you become [of] three kinds:

verses.arabic: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ
verses.english: And the forerunners, the forerunners -

verses.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.english: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]

verses.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: A [large] company of the former peoples

verses.arabic: وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: And a few of the later peoples,

verses.arabic: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّوْضُونَةٍ
verses.english: On thrones woven [with ornament],

verses.arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.english: Reclining on them, facing each other.

verses.arabic: بِأَكْوَابٍ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍ
verses.english: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -

verses.arabic: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.english: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.

verses.arabic: وَحُورٌ عِينٌ
verses.english: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,

verses.arabic: كَأَمْثَـٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُؤِ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ
verses.english: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,

verses.arabic: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: As reward for what they used to do.

verses.arabic: إِلَّا قِيلًا سَلَـٰمًا سَلَـٰمًا
verses.english: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."

verses.arabic: وَطَلْحٍ مَّنضُودٍ
verses.english: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]

verses.arabic: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ
verses.english: And fruit, abundant [and varied],

verses.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: A company of the former peoples

verses.arabic: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: And a company of the later peoples.

verses.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ
verses.english: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,

verses.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: And they used to persist in the great violation,

verses.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.english: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

verses.arabic: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
verses.english: And our forefathers [as well]?"

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.english: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples

verses.arabic: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.english: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,

verses.arabic: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.english: And filling with it your bellies

verses.arabic: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.english: And drinking on top of it from scalding water

verses.arabic: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ
verses.english: We have created you, so why do you not believe?

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ
verses.english: Have you seen that which you emit?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.english: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?

verses.arabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.english: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ
verses.english: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ
verses.english: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?

verses.arabic: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ
verses.english: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;

verses.arabic: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.english: Rather, we have been deprived."

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ
verses.english: And have you seen the water that you drink?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
verses.english: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?

verses.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ
verses.english: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?

verses.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
verses.english: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

verses.arabic: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَـٰهَا تَذْكِرَةً وَمَتَـٰعًا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ
verses.english: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

verses.arabic: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ
verses.english: None touch it except the purified.

verses.arabic: أَفَبِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ
verses.english: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent

verses.arabic: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.english: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?

verses.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ
verses.english: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat

verses.arabic: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.english: And you are at that time looking on -

verses.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.english: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -

verses.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ
verses.english: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,

verses.arabic: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?

verses.arabic: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.english: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,

verses.arabic: فَرَوْحٌ وَرَيْحَانٌ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍ
verses.english: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.

verses.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.english: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,

verses.arabic: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
verses.english: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water

verses.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.english: Indeed, this is the true certainty,

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.english: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful.

verses.arabic: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ
verses.english: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.english: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.

verses.arabic: مَا قَطَعْتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوْ تَرَكْتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخْزِىَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.english: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَٰنِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِٱلْإِيمَـٰنِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِى قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.english: And [there is a share for] those who came after them, saying, "Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts [any] resentment toward those who have believed. Our Lord, indeed You are Kind and Merciful."

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْتَنظُرْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do.

verses.arabic: وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.english: And be not like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves. Those are the defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ ٱلسَّلَـٰمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُ ٱلْمُهَيْمِنُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْجَبَّارُ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.english: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Perfection, the Bestower of Faith, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might, the Compeller, the Superior. Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.

verses.arabic: إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا۟ لَكُمْ أَعْدَآءً وَيَبْسُطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِٱلسُّوٓءِ وَوَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.english: If they gain dominance over you, they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil, and they wish you would disbelieve.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ قَـٰتَلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَأَخْرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ وَظَـٰهَرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ إِخْرَاجِكُمْ أَن تَوَلَّوْهُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمْ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.english: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?

verses.arabic: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.english: Great is hatred in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do.

verses.arabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلَـٰمِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.

verses.arabic: وَءَاخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا۟ بِهِمْ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.english: And [to] others of them who have not yet joined them. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

verses.arabic: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوٓا۟ إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful."

verses.arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ تِجَـٰرَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا ٱنفَضُّوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَآئِمًا ۚ قُلْ مَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ ٱلتِّجَـٰرَةِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
verses.english: But when they saw a transaction or a diversion, [O Muhammad], they rushed to it and left you standing. Say, "What is with Allah is better than diversion and than a transaction, and Allah is the best of providers."

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا۟ فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.english: That is because they believed, and then they disbelieved; so their hearts were sealed over, and they do not understand.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of Allah. And whoever does that - then those are the losers.

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.english: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.

verses.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.english: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward.

verses.arabic: فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا
verses.english: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss.

verses.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.english: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded.

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.english: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -

verses.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ
verses.english: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -

verses.arabic: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
verses.english: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.

verses.arabic: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ
verses.english: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner?"

verses.arabic: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.english: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?

verses.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.english: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.

verses.arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.english: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.

verses.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَـٰٓفَّـٰتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.english: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.

verses.arabic: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.english: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.

verses.arabic: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
verses.english: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?

verses.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.english: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful."

verses.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

verses.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.english: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."

verses.arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.english: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?"

verses.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ
verses.english: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe,

verses.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.english: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.english: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.

verses.arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.english: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.

verses.arabic: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ
verses.english: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].

verses.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
verses.english: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.

verses.arabic: وَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ
verses.english: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].

verses.arabic: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيمٍ
verses.english: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -

verses.arabic: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ
verses.english: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.

verses.arabic: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.english: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,

verses.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.english: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."

verses.arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.english: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.

verses.arabic: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
verses.english: And it became as though reaped.

verses.arabic: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.english: And they called one another at morning,

verses.arabic: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ
verses.english: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."

verses.arabic: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ
verses.english: So they set out, while lowering their voices,

verses.arabic: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ
verses.english: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.

verses.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.english: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;

verses.arabic: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.english: Rather, we have been deprived."

verses.arabic: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.english: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, \'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?\' "

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.english: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

verses.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.english: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.

verses.arabic: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.english: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?

verses.arabic: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
verses.english: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.

verses.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.english: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.

verses.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.english: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

verses.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.english: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.english: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.

verses.arabic: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.english: What is the Inevitable Reality?

verses.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.english: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?

verses.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
verses.english: Thamud and \'Aad denied the Striking Calamity.

verses.arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
verses.english: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

verses.arabic: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
verses.english: Then do you see of them any remains?

verses.arabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
verses.english: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship

verses.arabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
verses.english: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

verses.arabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
verses.english: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -

verses.arabic: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.english: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

verses.arabic: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
verses.english: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

verses.arabic: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.english: And had not known what is my account.

verses.arabic: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
verses.english: I wish my death had been the decisive one.

verses.arabic: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ
verses.english: Gone from me is my authority."

verses.arabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
verses.english: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

verses.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.english: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

verses.arabic: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ
verses.english: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend

verses.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.english: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

verses.arabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.english: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.

verses.arabic: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.english: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings,
